intro: Arachnothryx discolor is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the "yellow spider flower" due to its striking yellow and red flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help in the treatment of wounds, fever, and respiratory issues.
